$comment: Human-readable map: what data the archive/website stores → which JSON Schema defines it. Use with registry.json.

entities.name: Species
entities.website_use: Species detail page, archive cards, filters, citations, epistemic tier copy
core_data_kinds: Curation scores: scores (sensory + music potential), data_availability
Umwelt design: merkwelt_cues, chronobiology_notes, inference_confidence, proxy_species
Provenance: list_source, source_row_id, verification_note, provenance, citations

Archival research: archival_portals.portal_urls (IUCN/GBIF/MorphoSource/PBDB/BHL/EOL/Smithsonian/sketchfab/wikipedia; optional xeno_canto, macaulay), notable_archives_curated[], research_protocol[], last_synchronized_at

entities.name: Site
entities.website_use: Global nav, locales, SEO, featured slugs, policy links
core_data_kinds: routes (paths for home, species index, collections, about, ethics)
seo defaults, content_policy (AI disclosure, IUCN disclaimer text)

entities.name: Collection
entities.website_use: Curated lists: e.g. pharm-related, high-data, Pleistocene megafauna
core_data_kinds: filter (categories, scores, data_availability, list_sources) OR ordered_species_slugs

entities.name: Experience
entities.website_use: WebXR chapter, ethical fork capsule, living entrainment (future)

entities.name: ArchiveBundle
entities.website_use: Single JSON export or CDN payload: meta + site + species[] + collections[] + experiences[]
core_data_kinds: nested: site, arrays for species, collections, experiences

supplementary_assets_not_in_species_sche.purpose: Per-taxon portal URLs (GBIF, IUCN search, MorphoSource, BHL, etc.) — merge into species record or load sidecar by slug
Flat catalog export for spreadsheets / import pipelines
CSV column → species JSON path when importing from spreadsheets
